youtube_items.summary: Hey everyone, welcome back to the Edgitech channel, your go-to place for futurep proof learning. Today we're diving into a topic that's flipping classrooms upside down and turning traditional education into something smarter, faster, and way more exciting. That's right. We're talking about artificial intelligence or AI in the classroom. Now, imagine this. Your homework isn't one sizefits-all anymore. Instead, it adjusts to match your pace. Your teacher has an AI assistant that grades your quizzes in seconds and spots exactly what you need to revise. And your lessons are no longer just about memorizing facts, but about understanding them at your own speed. Well, this isn't science fiction anymore. This is the classroom of 2025. raw_items.title: Education
raw_items.summary: Education is the transmission of knowledge and skills and the development of character traits. Formal education happens in a complex institutional framework, like public schools. Non-formal education is also structured but occurs outside the formal schooling system, while informal education is unstructured learning through daily experiences. Formal and non-formal education are divided into levels

raw_items.title: Education - Simple English Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
raw_items.summary: Learn about education as a process of learning skills and knowledge, and how it is categorized into formal, non-formal, and informal types. Find out about different teaching methods, learning theories, and educational assessment.

raw_items.title: Learning
raw_items.summary: Learning is the process of acquiring new understanding, knowledge, behavior, skills, values, attitudes, and preferences. The ability to learn is possessed by humans, other animals, and some machines. There is also evidence for some kind of learning in certain plants.
